commands.author: joshuaswarren
commands.command: quick follow-up: the latest pushed head is now 6f4d20af34 after fixing the ci type annotations from the rerun. all feedback remains addressed: - reset broadcasts are preserved for `sessions.reset` and the reset path now keeps a consistent config snapshot when reloading the entry under the store lock. - `api.resetsession(key, reason?)` is documented in the plugin runtime docs. - the changelog includes the new plugin sdk reset-session api entry. - the plugin sdk api baseline was regenerated and checked. focused local validation on the final head: - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` - `pnpm test -- src/gateway/server.sessions.reset-hooks.test.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts` - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` - direct `tsgo` core + extensions checks using the installed binaries, because this worktree has broken `.bin` symlink resolution for `pnpm exec` after reinstall. - direct `oxfmt --check --threads=1` for the touched gateway files and sdk hash. the earlier duplicate `plugindiagnostic` parser failure and the later reset-session type errors are fixed in the pr branch.
commands.freeform_prompt: quick follow-up: the latest pushed head is now 6f4d20af34 after fixing the CI type annotations from the rerun. All feedback remains addressed: - Reset broadcasts are preserved for `sessions.reset` and the reset path now keeps a consistent config snapshot when reloading the entry under the store lock. - `api.resetSession(key, reason?)` is documented in the plugin runtime docs. - The changelog includes the new plugin SDK reset-session API entry. - The plugin SDK API baseline was regenerated and checked. Focused local validation on the final head: - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` - `pnpm test -- src/gateway/server.sessions.reset-hooks.test.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts` - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` - Direct `tsgo` core + extensions checks using the installed binaries, because this worktree has broken `.bin` symlink resolution for `pnpm exec` after reinstall. - Direct `oxfmt --check --threads=1` for the touched gateway files and SDK hash. The earlier duplicate `PluginDiagnostic` parser failure and the later reset-session type errors are fixed in the PR branch.
